description: Wear these socks with trainers when you're working out or to keep your feet comfortable when wearing formal shoes.  puma ensure that all their products are designed to offer the best performance and these socks are no exception.Ankle length socks in blackMade of blended cotton knitRib at opening to grip above ankleThree dimensional shaped heel and toe for best FitSock careMachine wash in warm waterDo not iron, bleach, tumble dry or dry clean
